title: Simply Powers
description: This is an addon for palladium adding generic and simple powers
body:
Simply Powers is an addon that brings simple and generic yet effective powers to minecraft through the Palladium mod made by Lucraft.

As of version 1.0.0, there is 12 powers, these powers are listed below.

Powers:

- Strength
- Speed
- Flight
- Size
- Dodge
- Teleport
- Telekinesis
- Gravity
- Phasing
- Regeneration
- Invisibility
- Storage

To Get Started You are going to need 5 items, these items include: An Amethyst Shard, Prismarine Shard, Blaze Rod, Ender Pearl and Echo Shard. Once you have gathered these items, you simply need to throw 1 of each item on the ground next to each other, after which they will be destroyed and you will granted a random power.

To remove your powers, it is a similar process to getting them. You will need another 5 items. Rotten Flesh, Nether Wart, Pufferfish, Gunpowder and Phantom Membrane. Much like getting powers, you just need to throw them on the ground next to each other and all your powers will be removed.

I hope you enjoy, and if you want you should check out my youtube where I go over all the powers. Have fun!
